title: Milpitas Walmart rooftop-solar fire allegation
cause: Walmart's complaint alleged that faulty connectors in the Tesla-installed PV system caused the fire; the claim was not adjudicated as a final official cause determination.
sourceTitle: Walmart Inc. v. Tesla Inc. complaint
summary: The retailer alleged more than $500,000 in losses from the 2016 rooftop fire; the exact date was not stated publicly.

title: Taipei Water Park solar panel fire
cause: Local media reported the fire could have been sparked by soaring temperatures or a short circuit due to overheating of the 10-year-old panels.
summary: A fire broke out at a solar panel installation at the Taipei Water Park during a heatwave, prompting the evacuation of over 1,200 people. The fire was extinguished within half an hour with no injuries reported.

title: Lakeside Walmart rooftop-solar fire allegation
cause: Walmart's complaint alleged that faulty connectors in the Tesla-installed PV system caused the fire; the claim was not adjudicated as a final official cause determination.
sourceTitle: Walmart Inc. v. Tesla Inc. complaint
summary: The complaint's detailed incident paragraph identifies Lakeside, Colorado, while its opening summary says California. Colorado is geocoded here as probable; the exact date and loss were not stated.

title: Sandridge Hill solar farm fire
cause: The cause of the fire is not specified, but firefighters faced challenges due to the live panels.
sourceTitle: Solar farm fire in Wiltshire highlights solar panel fire risks
summary: A solar farm caught fire at Snarlton Farm on Sandridge Hill near Melksham, Wiltshire. Firefighters faced challenges due to the live panels and high voltages. The incident highlighted the need for specialized equipment like PVSTOP for solar panel fires.

title: Bow Wharf residential roof fire
cause: PV involvement was reported by witnesses; the final ignition source was not publicly established.
summary: A large fire damaged the roof of a new residential development with rooftop PV.

title: Crowan residential PV roof fire
cause: Public reporting identified a roof fire involving solar panels; cause was not stated.
summary: Fire crews responded to a roof fire at a property with a PV installation.

title: Beavercreek Walmart rooftop-solar fire allegation
cause: Walmart's complaint attributed the fire to the rooftop PV system and cited water intrusion through an improperly sealed inverter enclosure and melted hardware; the allegation was not adjudicated.
sourceTitle: Walmart Inc. v. Tesla Inc. complaint
summary: The store was evacuated and closed for eight days; Walmart alleged approximately $784,293 in losses.

title: Denton Walmart rooftop-solar fire allegation
cause: Walmart's complaint alleged that the fire originated in the Tesla PV system and involved an inverter; the allegation was not adjudicated as a final official cause determination.
sourceTitle: Walmart Inc. v. Tesla Inc. complaint
summary: The May 2018 event damaged the store roof; the complaint also documented roof-membrane punctures.

title: Indio Walmart rooftop-solar fire allegation
cause: Walmart's investigation alleged the fire originated within a Tesla-installed module and cited hot spots, grounding, wiring and connector-torque issues; the allegation was not adjudicated.
sourceTitle: Walmart Inc. v. Tesla Inc. complaint
summary: Fire engulfed the roof and extended into the store, prompting evacuation; one firefighter was treated for smoke inhalation and Walmart alleged multimillion-dollar losses.

title: Redlands Amazon rooftop-solar fire
cause: Amazon confirmed that a Tesla solar installation caught fire; no failed component or final public root-cause determination was reported.
summary: A small, contained fire occurred on the fulfillment-center rooftop in June 2018; no injuries were reported.

title: Weeke house solar-array fire
cause: An electrical fault in the PV array was reported as the most likely cause.
summary: A house fire required a prolonged response; the PV array was identified as the most likely origin.

title: Yuba City Walmart rooftop-solar fire allegation
cause: Walmart's complaint alleged that arcing in the de-energized Tesla PV system degraded insulation and incinerated part of the roof; the allegation was not adjudicated.
sourceTitle: Walmart Inc. v. Tesla Inc. complaint
summary: Damage was discovered on November 29 after an event believed to have occurred between June 5 and September 11; Walmart alleged about $125,000 in repair and investigation costs.

title: California Valley Solar Ranch fire
cause: A bird bridged energized conductors, creating sparks that ignited vegetation.
summary: The incident burned more than 1,100 acres and temporarily removed most plant capacity from service.

title: Diest meat processing plant PV inverter fire
cause: The fire was suspected to be caused by extreme heat affecting the solar panel electrical cabinets.
sourceTitle: Zonnepanelen vatten vuur in Diest: brand in vleesbedrijf
summary: A fire broke out in an electrical cabinet for the solar panel installation on the roof of a meat processing plant in Diest. The fire, suspected to be caused by extreme heat, was quickly noticed by employees and extinguished. There were no injuries and no damage to the products.

title: Yamakura Dam floating-PV fire
cause: Typhoon Faxai displaced modules and array sections; fire occurred during the event.
summary: A typhoon damaged the floating array and complicated firefighting at the installation.

title: Humpty Doo commercial PV fire
cause: The public incident account did not identify a final cause.
summary: A commercial rooftop array burned but the fire was contained before spreading through the building.

title: Changhua Fangyuan Industrial Park Rooftop Solar Fire
cause: Cause not determined in available reporting.
sourceTitle: 當惡火燒上屋頂光電 正視太陽能板火警降低救災風險是第一步
summary: A major fire broke out at a plastics factory with rooftop solar panels in Fangyuan Industrial Park. The fire destroyed the factory building and the solar panels.

title: Fresno distribution-center PV fire
cause: Public reports linked the incident to the rooftop PV installation.
summary: Hundreds of rooftop modules were damaged at a distribution facility.

title: Ajka nursing home roof PV fire
cause: The wiring of the solar panels caught fire.
sourceTitle: Napelem gyulladt ki egy ajkai idősotthon tetején
summary: The wiring of solar panels caught fire on the roof of a nursing home in Ajka, spreading to about 10-20 square meters of the roof structure. Forty-five people were evacuated while firefighters extinguished the blaze.

title: Castenaso residential PV fire
cause: Flames started from the electrical cables powering the system.
sourceTitle: Castenaso: rogo all'impianto fotovoltaico, le fiamme partite dai cavi elettrici
summary: A fire broke out in a photovoltaic system with about sixty panels on the roof of a residential building in Castenaso. The fire, which started from the electrical cables, was extinguished by firefighters, and residents evacuated safely without injuries.

title: Coleridge Community College roof fire
cause: Reporting indicated the sports-hall PV system as a possible origin.
summary: The school sports-hall roof sustained extensive damage.

title: Ullum II solar park inverter fire
cause: A fire occurred in an electrical inverter at the solar park; the company stated they were conducting technical audits to determine the exact cause.
summary: A fire in an inverter at the Ullum II solar park affected 3 MW of the 82 MW capacity and was quickly controlled by volunteer firefighters.

title: Wilson Solar Farm 7 grass fire
cause: A fire burned more than an acre of land at the solar farm, under investigation by the NC Forest Service.
summary: On March 9, 2021, a grass fire burned more than an acre of land at Wilson Solar Farm 7 in Wilson County, North Carolina. The fire was investigated by the NC Forest Service.

title: Polvijärvi holiday home PV roof fire
cause: The solar panels on the roof of the holiday home caught fire.
sourceTitle: Vapaa-ajan asunnon aurinkopaneelit syttyivät palamaan Polvijärvellä
summary: The solar panels on the roof of a holiday home in Ukonniementie, Polvijärvi, caught fire. The first responding emergency medical unit started initial extinguishing with a powder extinguisher and managed to significantly limit the fire.

title: Oberderdingen industrial hall PV fire
cause: The electrics of the photovoltaic system installed on the hall roof caught fire for an initially unknown reason.
sourceTitle: 09.05.2021 - 12.57 - Brandeinsatz, Großbrand - Brand Photovoltaikanlage Industriehalle, Hagenfeldstraße, Ortsteil Oberderdingen
summary: A fire broke out in the photovoltaic system on the roof of a plastics processing company in Oberderdingen. The fire department quickly brought the fire under control, preventing it from burning through into the interior of the hall.

title: Casorate Primo residential PV fire
cause: Fire started in some solar panels on the roof of a house.
summary: Firefighters intervened for a fire involving solar panels on the roof of a house in Casorate Primo. The fire was contained, saving most of the roof, and no one was injured.

title: Perryville Amazon rooftop-PV fire
cause: The Maryland State Fire Marshal's preliminary finding classified the event as accidental and described an unspecified event involving the solar-panel system.
sourceTitle: Fox News citing Maryland State Fire Marshal
summary: About 60 firefighters controlled the rooftop event in 80 minutes; damage was estimated at $500,000 and one employee was evaluated without a reported injury.

title: Lörrach residential solar panel fire
cause: A solar panel on the roof of a house caught fire slightly and was extinguished and disconnected by the fire brigade.
summary: A minor fire occurred involving a single solar panel on a residential roof in Lörrach, which was quickly extinguished without causing damage to the building itself.

title: Montbonnot gymnasium roof fire
cause: The reported incident involved the building's PV-covered roof; final cause was not stated.
summary: Roughly 70 firefighters responded and approximately half of the building was destroyed.

title: Gunsan solar power plant inverter fire
cause: An investigation by the Korean Fire Protection Association found that moisture condensation and dust accumulation led to insulation breakdown and arc tracking between the anode and cathode plates in the inverter.
summary: A fire occurred in an inverter at a solar power plant in Gunsan, caused by insulation failure due to moisture and dust. No casualties were reported.

title: Queensland residential solar panel isolator fire
cause: A solar panel isolator exploded on a roof, with the homeowner reporting a huge bang and finding the box broken and twisted.
summary: A homeowner in Queensland experienced a solar panel isolator explosion on his roof, prompting calls for increased maintenance checks on older systems.

title: Finley Solar Farm vegetation fire
cause: Cause was under investigation in the public report.
summary: A fire affected about five hectares within the solar-farm site.

title: Newburyport printing-plant rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire burned within a large rooftop PV array; the fire chief said the cause remained under investigation.
sourceTitle: WCVB reporting from Newburyport fire officials
summary: A three-alarm fire affected the 150-by-60-foot rooftop array; dozens evacuated, no one was injured, and damage was estimated at $2 million to $4 million.

title: Stavanger residential PV roof fire
cause: A suspected mechanical damage in a cable caused an arc fault, which ignited the material under the solar panels.
sourceTitle: Solcelleanlegg mangler brannmur – ville gitt bedre sikkerhet og færre skader
summary: A fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of a residential house in Stavanger in May 2022. The fire caused major water and smoke damage to the house, making it uninhabitable for over a year. The fire is suspected to have been caused by an arc fault in a damaged cable.

title: Glenn Dale commercial roof PV fire
cause: Officials reportedly believed multiple solar panels were involved in ignition.
summary: Firefighters responded to flames on a commercial roof fitted with PV.

title: Church Crookham flats roof fire
cause: Solar panels were involved; final ignition source was not included in the public account.
summary: The roof of a block of flats was destroyed during the fire.

title: Kappel-Grafenhausen solar park inverter fire
cause: A smoldering fire occurred in the inverter system of a solar park for unknown reasons, causing significant property damage.
summary: A fire broke out in an inverter container at a solar park next to a theme park, resulting in high five-figure property damage but no injuries.

title: Vidigulfo kindergarten PV fire
cause: Flames reportedly started from the electrical control unit of the photovoltaic system.
sourceTitle: In fiamme il tetto fotovoltaico dell'asilo, paura per 150 bambini
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of a kindergarten in Vidigulfo, prompting the evacuation of 150 children. The fire, which started from the PV system's electrical unit, was quickly extinguished by firefighters with limited damage to the roof.

title: Gigean residential roof fire
cause: The roof of a house covered with photovoltaic panels caught fire and collapsed; the solar installation is strongly suspected as the origin, though the exact cause is pending investigation.
summary: A spectacular nighttime fire destroyed the roof of a house in Gigean, causing the structure to collapse and forcing the relocation of the residents.

title: Tai Po Chong Tak Street rooftop PV fire
cause: The fire was suspected to be caused by overheating of the solar panels, which ignited rubbish stuck to them.
sourceTitle: 天台太陽能板疑過熱釀火警
summary: A fire broke out on the rooftop of a building on Chong Tak Street in Tai Po, Hong Kong. Firefighters suspected that the solar panels overheated and ignited rubbish attached to them. The fire was quickly extinguished with no injuries reported.

title: MGM Mega Solar Array transformer arson
cause: According to the arrest report, a man crashed and burned a vehicle next to a transformer; this was an external attack on a PV facility, not a PV equipment failure.
summary: The transformer was damaged and the utility-scale solar facility temporarily shut down; no employees were present and no injuries were reported.

title: Sandisfield residential solar-panel fire
cause: A rooftop solar panel apparently erupted in flames, destroying part of the roof; the cause is undetermined and under investigation by a state electrical inspector.
summary: A stubborn fire involving a rooftop solar panel burned through a residential roof and reignited several times, causing attic damage but no injuries.

title: Falmouth residential solar-panel fire
cause: Cause was not publicly reported.
summary: Firefighters contained a fire in rooftop panels and checked the attic for extension.

title: Beryl Solar Farm grass fire
cause: Grass between the solar panels caught fire, with the root cause under investigation.
summary: A grass fire broke out between solar panels at the 110 MW Beryl Solar Farm near Gulgong in central New South Wales. Fire crews brought the blaze under control within a few hours. The root cause of the fire is under investigation.

title: Essen-Steele apartment building roof fire
cause: A fire broke out under the roof tiles and newly installed solar panels of an apartment building; the cause is unclear and under police investigation.
summary: A fire developed under the roof tiles and solar panels of an apartment building in Essen-Steele, requiring the fire brigade to remove roof coverings to extinguish it.

title: Wickford residential solar panel fire
cause: The cause of the fire was an electrical fault in an electrical cupboard in the loft connected to solar panels on the roof.
summary: Firefighters responded to a roof fire at a detached house in Wickford. The fire started in an electrical cupboard in the loft connected to solar panels on the roof. The fire was extinguished and no injuries were reported.

title: Gosport apartment-block PV fire
cause: A fire involved panels on the roof; final cause was not stated.
summary: Residents were evacuated while crews tackled a rooftop PV fire.

title: Voerde community center flat roof PV fire
cause: A fire broke out on the flat roof of a community center involving solar panels; initial findings suggest a technical defect was the cause.
summary: Approximately 20 square meters of solar panels caught fire on the flat roof of a community center in Voerde, causing an estimated 15,000 euros in damage.

title: Stange residential PV system fire
cause: Open flames were reported in an emergency stop switch.
summary: A fire broke out in a solar panel system on a residential house in Stange. There were open flames in an emergency stop switch. The fire was extinguished using a powder extinguisher.

title: Jinju School Auditorium BIPV Solar Module Fire
cause: Cause not determined in available reporting.
sourceTitle: 태양광 화재, 더 이상 무시할 수 없다! 안전한 미래를 위한 예방과 대책
summary: Fire occurred in the BIPV solar modules installed on the roof of a school auditorium in Jinju, resulting in the destruction of the solar modules.

title: Sandnes residential integrated PV roof fire
cause: Fire started in the integrated solar panels on the roof of a residential house, causing major damage to the roof and water damage inside.
sourceTitle: Brann i bolighus med solcelleanlegg: – Svært vanskelig å slukke slike branner
summary: A fire broke out in the integrated solar panels on the roof of a residential house in Sandnes. The fire caused major damage to the roof and water damage inside the house. The fire department had a difficult time extinguishing the fire because the panels continued to produce electricity.

title: Vodacom Century City office rooftop PV fire
cause: Preliminary findings found the cause of the fire to be an electrical fault, not caused by the solar PV system itself.
sourceTitle: Vodacom South Africa Century City building fire not caused by solar PV system
summary: On July 9, 2023, a fire broke out at the Vodacom Century City offices in Cape Town, South Africa. The rooftop solar PV system was seen burning, and firefighters took several hours to contain the blaze. Vodacom confirmed that the fire was caused by an electrical fault and not by the solar PV system itself.

title: Kristiansand residential PV roof fire
cause: The fire is believed to have started in a solar panel on the roof and spread to the rest of the building.
summary: A fire broke out in a solar panel on the roof of a terraced house in Kristiansand. The fire spread to the rest of the building, completely destroying three residential units. The fire department had a difficult time extinguishing the fire from the outside.

title: Darwin residential DC isolator fire
cause: A DC isolator part of a solar PV system caught fire, likely due to moisture absorption or incorrect installation.
sourceTitle: NT WorkSafe issues safety warning after jump in fires from DC isolators part of solar PV systems
summary: A DC isolator on a residential solar PV system in Darwin caught fire, melting an NBN box and damaging garden piping. The fire was contained by the brick exterior of the home. This incident is part of a broader trend of DC isolator failures in the Northern Territory.

title: Greenford council house roof fire
cause: A London Fire Brigade spokesperson confirmed the blaze involved a solar panel and said the blaze was believed to be accidental.
summary: A fire sparked by solar panels destroyed the roof of a council house in West London, forcing the family to relocate. Firefighters used PVStop to isolate power to other solar panels in the neighbourhood.

title: Antioch Office Depot rooftop-PV fire
cause: Firefighters found multiple solar panels and a small roof area burning; the public report did not establish whether PV equipment initiated the fire.
sourceTitle: Contra Costa News quoting Con Fire
summary: Office Depot and a neighboring PetSmart were evacuated; the fire caused significant water damage and temporarily closed the store.

title: Centennial Middle School solar panel fire
cause: A small fire involving solar equipment occurred in the parking lot of the school.
sourceTitle: Solar panel fire at local middle school contained
summary: On September 15, 2023, a small fire involving solar equipment occurred in the parking lot of Centennial Middle School in Yuma, Arizona. The fire was contained by the Yuma Fire Department, and students were evacuated but later returned to class.

title: Beaumaris residential solar panel fire
cause: Fire Rescue Victoria stated it is believed the incident may have been sparked by an electrical fault related to a solar panel.
summary: A fire broke out in the back roof of a double-storey home in Hepburn Avenue, Beaumaris, and was quickly controlled by firefighters.

title: Qionghai Boao rooftop PV fire
cause: The fire was reportedly caused by substandard PV panels purchased online.
sourceTitle: 光伏防灾系列 ▏光伏电站火灾原因及有效预防
summary: A fire broke out on the top floor of a high-rise building in Boao, Qionghai, involving nearly 200 square meters of rooftop solar panels. The fire caused significant damage to the panels but resulted in no casualties. It was reportedly caused by substandard PV panels.

title: Miramar shopping center rooftop PV fire
cause: A small fire occurred in the solar panels located on the roof of the shopping center. The cause was not detailed in the official statement.
summary: A small fire broke out in the rooftop solar panels of the Miramar shopping center. It was quickly controlled by emergency services and the center reopened normally.

title: Douglas County residential solar-panel fire
cause: Authorities reported that the fire involved solar panels, but the exact cause remains under investigation.
summary: An investigation was launched after a fire at a Douglas County home that authorities stated involved solar panels.

title: Mannum Stage 2 solar farm inverter fire
cause: An inverter in a shipping container burst into flames during the commissioning process.
summary: An inverter fire at the Mannum Stage 2 solar farm injured a worker and caused an estimated $167,170 in damages.

title: Araquari industrial solar roof fire
cause: The fire affected approximately 30 square meters of the roof where solar panels were installed; the exact cause was under investigation.
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of an industrial building along BR-101, affecting the solar panel installation and requiring 15,000 liters of water to extinguish.

title: Viared industrial PV roof fire
cause: The fire is reported to have started in the solar panels on the roof of the industrial building.
summary: A fire broke out in an industrial building in Viared outside Borås. According to reports, the fire started in the solar panels on the roof of the building and there were open flames. The fire department responded to the scene.

title: Peterborough logistics-warehouse PV fire
cause: The public engineering account described a fire involving rooftop panels; ignition cause was not stated.
summary: More than 50 firefighters protected a 45,000-square-meter warehouse valued at about £70 million.

title: Österhaninge warehouse PV roof fire
cause: A fire broke out in parts of a solar panel system on the roof of a warehouse.
summary: A fire broke out in a solar panel system on the roof of a warehouse in Österhaninge, south of Stockholm. The fire initially burned with open flames but was brought under control by the fire department. There were no reports of injuries.

title: Haninge industrial building PV roof fire
cause: Fire started in the solar panels on the roof of an industrial building, causing damage to the panels and the roof.
sourceTitle: Brand i solcellsanläggning på industribyggnad Haninge
summary: A fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of an industrial building in Haninge. The fire was contained to the roof and extinguished by the fire department. The fire caused damage to the solar panels and the roof.

title: Poole Travelodge roof fire
cause: The fire service found the blaze in a junction of some solar panels and extinguished it using foam.
summary: Hotel customers were evacuated after a fire involving solar panels broke out on the roof. The fire was extinguished and no issues were found after a reinspection.

title: Sandrigo residential PV fire
cause: Flames reportedly broke out from two photovoltaic panels and quickly spread to the entire ventilated wooden roof.
summary: A severe fire, reportedly starting from photovoltaic panels, destroyed the roof of a renovated courtyard house, rendering it uninhabitable.

title: Sendai mega solar inverter fire
cause: A capacitor inside a distributed power conditioning system (PCS) failed, causing the enclosure to break and burning components to fall onto dry grass, starting a fire.
sourceTitle: 仙台市のメガソーラー火災、分散PCSから発火
summary: A fire occurred at the Nishi-Sendai Golf Course Mega Solar Power Plant. A faulty capacitor in a distributed PCS caused burning components to fall and ignite dry grass, burning approximately 40,000 square meters and damaging 355 solar panels.

title: Zwartsluis residential solar-roof fire
cause: Local reporting described a roof fire apparently originating near the solar installation.
summary: A fire damaged a home roof fitted with PV panels.

title: Sydney Olympic Park Aquatic Centre solar panel fire
cause: Fire and Rescue NSW reported a working fire in the solar panels on the roof of the sporting facility, with investigations underway to determine the cause.
summary: A fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of the Sydney Olympic Park Aquatic Centre, leading to the safe evacuation of over 2,500 people.

title: Costa del Este bank rooftop PV fire
cause: Local reporting attributed the incident to malfunctioning rooftop PV equipment.
summary: Firefighters extinguished a fire at a bank branch associated with its rooftop solar system.

title: Gothenburg preschool PV roof fire
cause: A fire broke out in the solar panel system on the roof of the preschool.
summary: A major fire broke out in the solar panel system on the roof of a preschool in Brämaregården, Gothenburg. The preschool was in operation at the time, but all children were safely evacuated. The fire burned with open flames on the roof and attic.

title: Lund biomedical center PV roof fire
cause: A fire broke out in connection with a solar panel installation on the roof.
summary: A fire broke out in connection with a solar panel installation on the roof of the biomedical center next to Skåne University Hospital in Lund. The fire department quickly extinguished the initial fire and prevented it from spreading further into the roof and building.

title: Peterborough residential solar panel fire
cause: Firefighters discovered multiple roof-mounted solar panels on fire, cause remains under investigation.
sourceTitle: Peterborough firefighters tackle solar panel on fire at south-end home
summary: On May 31, 2024, firefighters responded to a house fire on Crawford Drive in Peterborough, Ontario. They discovered multiple roof-mounted solar panels on fire and were able to de-energize the array and suppress the fire, restricting damage to the roof and attic. No injuries were reported.

title: Northburn Community Centre solar panel fire
cause: The cause of the fire is under investigation, but it prompted safety checks on similar installations.
sourceTitle: Solar panel issue known a year before school fire
summary: A fire broke out involving solar panels at the Northburn Community Centre in Cramlington in June 2024. This incident prompted the Northumberland County Council to initiate safety checks on similar solar panel installations across its buildings.

title: Pembury Estate flats roof fire
cause: Residents and a fire safety expert suspect solar panels were to blame for the blaze, though the official cause is still under investigation by the Metropolitan Police.
summary: A fire gutted the roof of a block of flats in Dalston Lane, damaging 36 homes and forcing the evacuation of about 50 people. A fire risk assessment had failed to declare the presence of solar panels.

title: Salo PV system safety switch fire
cause: The safety switch of the solar panel system caught fire.
summary: A fire broke out in the safety switch of a solar panel system in Salo. The panels themselves were not on fire. People on site successfully performed initial extinguishing, which limited the fire. The fire department arrived, cut the wires, and completely extinguished the fire.

title: Břeclav administrative building roof PV fire
cause: Fire engulfed photovoltaic panels on the roof.
sourceTitle: Požár fotovoltaiky v Břeclavi zničil panely za pět milionů
summary: Photovoltaic panels caught fire on the roof of the Alcadrain administrative building in Břeclav. The flames affected an area of about 110 square meters, causing an estimated five million CZK in damages.

title: Anhausen residential PV battery fire
cause: A defect in the area of the installed photovoltaic system, specifically the burning battery storage, caused the fire.
sourceTitle: Aktualisiert: Brand in Anhausen - Defekt in Photovoltaik-Anlage möglicher Auslöser
summary: The roof structure of a single-family home in Anhausen caught fire. The fire department suspects a defect in the photovoltaic system, particularly the battery storage, which caused immense heat radiation and smoke development that spread to the roof. One resident was taken to the hospital with suspected smoke inhalation.

title: Santa Maria di Sala residential PV fire
cause: A roof fire was reportedly triggered by some photovoltaic panels, spreading to the wooden attic before being contained.
summary: Firefighters extinguished a roof fire that was triggered by photovoltaic panels and had spread to the wooden attic of a building.

title: Mesopotamia solar farm fire
cause: The fire reportedly started from a photovoltaic panel and quickly spread due to dry grass and strong winds.
sourceTitle: Φωτιά στην Καστοριά: Πυρκαγιά σε φωτοβολταϊκό πάρκο έξω από το χωριό Μεσοποταμία
summary: A fire broke out at a solar farm near Mesopotamia, Kastoria. According to reports, the fire started from a solar panel and spread rapidly due to dry grass and strong winds. Workers nearby alerted the fire department, who quickly extinguished the flames.

title: Fauglia warehouse PV fire
cause: Solar panels caught fire on the roof of a warehouse.
sourceTitle: Fauglia, pannelli solari a fuoco sul tetto di un capannone
summary: Solar panels caught fire on the roof of a warehouse in Fauglia. Firefighters intervened to extinguish the flames, preventing the fire from spreading inside the building, and secured the area by deactivating the solar panel system.

title: Larvik industrial PV system fire
cause: A short circuit in a switchboard room is believed to be the cause of the fire.
summary: A minor fire broke out in a solar panel system on an industrial building in Larvik. The fire department responded to the scene. A short circuit in a switchboard room is believed to be the cause of the fire.

title: San Martino del Lago farm PV fire
cause: A fire involved photovoltaic panels, a generator, and brushwood alongside a farmhouse; the cause is under investigation.
summary: A fire at a farmhouse involved photovoltaic panels and a generator, requiring a massive response from firefighters to contain the blaze.

title: Cumberland industrial building solar-panel fire
cause: Crews found solar panels on fire on the roof; the cause of the fire is under investigation by the state fire marshal.
summary: A fire involving rooftop solar panels broke out at an industrial building, prompting an evacuation and causing heat exhaustion for some firefighters, though there was no structural damage.

title: Helsinki empty school PV roof fire
cause: A solar panel on the roof of an empty school building caught fire for an unknown reason.
sourceTitle: Aurinkopaneeli syttyi tuleen vanhan parakkikoulun katolla
summary: A solar panel caught fire on the roof of an empty school building in Vartiokylä, Helsinki. A passerby noticed the smell of smoke and called the emergency center. The fire department extinguished the fire.

title: Kian Teck Road factory rooftop-PV fire
cause: Preliminary investigations by SCDF indicate the fire was likely of electrical origin from the solar panels.
summary: A fire involving rooftop solar panels at a factory in Kian Teck Road led to the evacuation of 76 workers, with no injuries reported.

title: Boyle Heights cold-storage PV fire
cause: LAFD confirmed that panels on the roof were burning; the public incident note did not state the ignition cause.
summary: Firefighters contained burning panels across a nearly 500,000-square-foot roof and saved the building.

title: Osmannoro warehouse roof fire
cause: Public reports noted PV on the burning roof; the final cause was not stated.
summary: Multiple crews responded to a large warehouse-roof fire that produced a heavy smoke plume.

title: Pamplona police-station solar roof fire
cause: Reporting located the origin at the PV-covered roof, with fire spreading through timber supports.
summary: Fire spread through roof supports beneath the photovoltaic installation.

title: Pfaffing solar farm transformer fire
cause: A transformer container belonging to a large ground-mounted photovoltaic system caught fire.
sourceTitle: Brand in Trafo-Container einer großen Freiflächen-Photovoltaikanlage
summary: A fire broke out in a transformer container at a large ground-mounted solar farm in Pfaffing, Upper Austria. Firefighters extinguished the smoldering fire using CO2 extinguishers after receiving clearance from the energy supplier.

title: Scottsdale Potato Barn rooftop-PV fire
cause: A company representative stated that while the exact cause is unconfirmed, photos and videos suggest it may have been caused by a solar panel malfunction.
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of a furniture store, activating sprinklers inside and causing substantial loss, though no injuries were reported.

title: Chiayi City Chongwen Elementary School Solar Panel Fire
cause: short circuit in the wiring of the solar panels
sourceTitle: 嘉義市崇文國小太陽能板火警 議員要求強化管理
summary: Fire broke out on the roof of the Yiren Building at Chongwen Elementary School in Chiayi City. The fire was suspected to be caused by a short circuit in the wiring of the solar panels.

title: Brussels office building solar-roof fire
cause: The fire started in the solar panels on the roof of the office building; the exact cause is not yet known.
summary: A fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of a recently completed seven-story office building, leading to a safe evacuation of all occupants.

title: Al-Shagaya Renewable Energy Complex solar power unit fire
cause: A probe into the incident was launched to identify its causes.
sourceTitle: KISR: putting out limited fire at Al-Shagaya renewable energy complex, no human losses
summary: On November 29, 2024, a fire broke out at the solar power unit of the Al-Shagaya Renewable Energy Complex in Kuwait. Firefighters extinguished the blaze, which caused limited material damage but no human casualties. The Kuwait Institute for Scientific Research (KISR) announced an investigation into the cause of the fire.

title: Alcalde Mayor solar park construction fire
cause: A fire broke out among stored solar panels waiting to be installed; the cause was unknown at the time of reporting.
summary: A small fire affected a group of stored solar panels at the Alcalde Mayor solar park construction site, causing only material damage.

title: Go Vap residential rooftop PV fire
cause: A loud explosion followed by a fire occurred on the rooftop of a three-story house where a solar power system was installed.
sourceTitle: Cháy nổ nghi từ hệ thống điện năng lượng mặt trời ở Gò Vấp
summary: A fire broke out on the rooftop of a three-story house in Go Vap district, Ho Chi Minh City, following a loud explosion during rain. The fire is suspected to have originated from the rooftop solar power system. The blaze caused significant property damage but no casualties.

title: Walla Walla solar farm grass fire
cause: A faulty solar panel sparked and ignited a small grass fire.
sourceTitle: 'I fear someone being killed': solar farm fire ignites concerns from neighbours
summary: A faulty solar panel sparked a small grass fire at the Walla Solar Farm in New South Wales. The fire was quickly contained by the Rural Fire Service. Neighbouring farmers raised concerns about the lack of grass maintenance and fire breaks at the facility.

title: Barneveld warehouse solar-roof fire
cause: A PV short circuit was publicly cited as the suspected cause.
summary: The fire was controlled quickly, but smoke, soot and inspection impacts were reported.

title: Raywood solar farm transformer fire
cause: A transformer caught fire on a moderately sized commercial solar farm, which is under investigation by Energy Safe Victoria.
summary: A transformer fire occurred at a solar farm near Raywood, Victoria, producing toxic smoke but no threat to the community.

title: Peoria solar farm fire
cause: A department investigator was unable to determine the cause and origin of the fire, which burned grass under the panel.
summary: A fire at a solar panel farm off North Galena Road caused $1,000 in damage to a panel and burned surrounding grass.

title: Jakarta PLTS (Solar Power Plant) fire
cause: User attempted to charge an electric vehicle directly from the inverter output without proper protection, causing a cable fire that spread to the battery and control panel.
sourceTitle: Kronologi Singkat kebakaran PLTS Di Jakarta yg Viral di Komunitas Panel Surya Indonesia
summary: A fire occurred at a solar power installation in Jakarta after a user attempted to charge an electric vehicle directly from the inverter output. The improper connection caused a cable fire, which was exacerbated by nearby oil and led to battery overheating and a fire in the control panel. Firefighters were called to extinguish the blaze.

title: Norden warehouse photovoltaic fire
cause: Cause was not established in the cited public account.
summary: A warehouse PV fire triggered a large emergency response and roof-opening work.

title: East Windsor solar-facility transformer fire
cause: An exploding transformer ignited dry vegetation at the solar facility.
summary: Fire affected a roughly 100-by-50-foot area but crews prevented spread to solar panels and nearby structures.

title: Heilbronn industrial-roof module fire
cause: Several modules burned; final ignition cause was not stated.
summary: Crews opened bitumen roofing and removed EPS insulation to extinguish smoldering material.

title: Laas fruit-warehouse PV-zone fire
cause: Public reporting identified a suspected technical origin in the PV zone.
summary: A roof fire affected roofing and insulation at a fruit cooperative warehouse.

title: Marbach residential PV fire
cause: A fire broke out in the roof of an apartment building, suspected to be caused by a technical defect in the newly installed PV system.
sourceTitle: Feuer in Mehrfamilienhaus ausgebrochen: PV-Anlage als Ursache vermutet
summary: A fire broke out in the roof of an apartment building in Marbach, Switzerland. The fire is suspected to have started from a newly installed photovoltaic system that covered the entire roof. The building was evacuated and no injuries were reported, but property damage exceeded 100,000 CHF.

title: Halle school solar-roof fire
cause: The fire brigade suspects that a technical defect in one of the solar panels caused the fire.
summary: A fire destroyed about 100 solar panels on the roof of a school, causing a large smoke plume but no injuries as few students were present.

title: Dahod NTPC solar plant godown fire
cause: A massive fire broke out at a godown storing materials for the under-construction 70 MW solar plant.
sourceTitle: Fire breaks out at godown of NTPC's solar plant in Gujarat's Dahod; no casualties
summary: A massive fire broke out at a godown storing materials for an under-construction 70 MW NTPC solar plant in Bhatiwada village, Dahod. The blaze caused significant destruction, gutting most of the materials stored, but no casualties were reported.

title: Maël-Carhaix agricultural hangar PV fire
cause: Fire broke out in a hangar covered with photovoltaic panels.
sourceTitle: Un hangar recouvert de panneaux photovoltaïques en feu dans le Centre-Bretagne
summary: A fire occurred in a 100 sqm agricultural hangar covered with solar panels in Maël-Carhaix, Côtes-d'Armor. The fire was contained before spreading to an adjacent poultry house.

title: Asan Industrial Park Rooftop Solar Panel Fire
cause: overheating at the contact surface between the solar panel and the roof
sourceTitle: 태양광 화재, 더 이상 무시할 수 없다! 안전한 미래를 위한 예방과 대책
summary: Fire broke out on the rooftop solar panels of an auto parts factory in an industrial park in Asan-si due to overheating at the contact surface.

title: Dongen leather factory rooftop-PV fire
cause: A large fire broke out in a leather processing factory, spreading to the roof where solar panels were installed.
sourceTitle: Grote brand in bedrijfspand Dongen, scherpe deeltjes zonnepanelen losgekomen
summary: A major fire broke out at a leather processing factory in Dongen, spreading to the roof which was equipped with solar panels. The fire department allowed the building to burn down in a controlled manner. The fire caused sharp foil particles from the solar panels to spread up to 8 kilometers away.

title: Veszprém Penny Market logistics center PV fire
cause: A solar panel system caught fire on the roof.
sourceTitle: Kiderült, mitől kaphatott lángra a Penny logisztikai központja
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of a Penny Market logistics center in Veszprém due to the solar panel system. The building was evacuated, and firefighters quickly extinguished the flames without any injuries reported.

title: Cinisello Balsamo warehouse PV fire
cause: Fire devastated the photovoltaic system of a warehouse.
sourceTitle: Incendio nel milanese, devastati pannelli solari sopra un capannone
summary: A fire devastated the photovoltaic system on the roof of a warehouse in Cinisello Balsamo. Firefighters from the Milan provincial command intervened with four vehicles and extinguished the flames after several hours.

title: Pasadena warehouse rooftop-PV fire
cause: Authorities reported workers were doing maintenance or installation work when the solar panels suddenly caught fire, though the fire department has not confirmed the exact cause.
summary: A fire started on the roof of a Lineage Company warehouse in Pasadena, charring the solar panels but causing no reported injuries.

title: Tulcea PV warehouse fire
cause: Fire broke out in a warehouse storing hundreds of photovoltaic panels.
sourceTitle: Incendiu într-o hală în care erau depozitate sute de panouri fotovoltaice, în Tulcea
summary: A fire affected a warehouse in Tulcea where hundreds of photovoltaic panels were stored. Approximately 360 solar panels were destroyed, and a van inside was damaged before firefighters contained the blaze.

title: Apeldoorn commercial solar-roof fire
cause: A fire broke out involving approximately 25 solar panels on the roof of a commercial building; the cause is still under investigation.
summary: A fire involving about 25 solar panels occurred on the roof of a commercial building in Apeldoorn, which was quickly controlled by the fire brigade.

title: Shanghai Hongmei South Road elevated highway PV fire
cause: The exact cause of the fire is under investigation, but it involved flexible PV modules installed on a noise barrier.
sourceTitle: 突发！刚并网的全国首个“光伏+隔声屏”项目起火
summary: A fire occurred on the noise barrier of the Hongmei South Road elevated highway in Shanghai, which was equipped with flexible PV modules. The fire burned a hole in the roof and damaged several PV panels. The incident happened just three weeks after the project was fully connected to the grid.

title: St Michael's Hospital roof fire
cause: Avon Fire and Rescue Service confirmed the cause was accidental and due to a fault in the solar panels.
summary: A blaze began in solar panels on the roof of a maternity hospital, forcing the evacuation of pregnant women and babies. The fire was safely extinguished with no injuries reported.

title: Tzrufa agricultural building solar roof fire
cause: A fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of an agricultural building; firefighters disconnected the power and extinguished it before it spread.
summary: Firefighters from the Hadera station extinguished a fire involving solar panels on an agricultural building's roof in Moshav Tzrufa, preventing extensive damage.

title: Frechilla de Almazán solar park fire
cause: The fire started in a transformation center at the solar park.
sourceTitle: Incendio en una planta solar en Frechilla de Almazán (Soria)
summary: A fire broke out at a solar park in Frechilla de Almazán, Soria, originating from a transformation center. Firefighters from Almazán extinguished the flames within two hours, preventing it from spreading further.

title: Środa Wielkopolska factory roof PV fire
cause: Fire originated in one of the devices of the photovoltaic installation.
sourceTitle: Pożar fotowoltaiki na terenie zakładu produkcyjnego w Środzie Wielkopolskiej
summary: A fire occurred in the photovoltaic installation on the roof of the Polipak factory in Środa Wielkopolska. Employees evacuated safely before firefighters arrived, and no injuries were reported.

title: Lona Lases residential PV fire
cause: The fire started in the photovoltaic panels of a house located above a bar near a gas station; the origin is under investigation.
summary: A fire involved the photovoltaic panels of a residence situated near a gas station, but firefighters prevented the flames from spreading to the rest of the building.

title: Bochum-Hiltrop residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: A fire broke out on the roof of a single-family home where a PV system was installed; the fire was quickly extinguished and the cause is under investigation by the criminal police.
summary: A fire occurred on the roof of a single-family home involving a PV system, which was quickly extinguished by the fire brigade from the ground.

title: Olmedilla de Alarcón solar plant vegetation fire
cause: A vegetation fire broke out inside the solar photovoltaic plant.
sourceTitle: Bomberos de la Diputación sofocan un incendio de vegetación en una planta solar de Olmedilla de Alarcón
summary: Firefighters extinguished a vegetation fire that broke out inside a solar photovoltaic plant in Olmedilla de Alarcón. The fire affected a scrubland area within the facility, requiring specialized intervention due to the electrical risks involved.

title: Veleň residential garage PV fire
cause: Technical fault in the photovoltaic switchboard.
sourceTitle: Pożar fotovoltaiky v garáži zaměstnal středočeské hasiče
summary: A fire broke out in the photovoltaic technology located in a residential garage in Veleň. Firefighters had to remove battery storage and cool propane-butane cylinders, with damages estimated at one million CZK.

title: Rotterdam residential solar-roof fire
cause: A large fire occurred on the roof of a residential building, which also involved the solar panels; the cause is being investigated by the fire brigade.
summary: A major roof fire spread to an adjacent home and involved solar panels, prompting the evacuation of the residential block.

title: Bochum-Wattenscheid balcony solar fire
cause: Parts of a balcony solar power plant caught fire and developed strong heat and smoke; the police have started investigating the cause.
summary: A fire broke out involving a balcony solar power plant on the first floor of a building, causing smoke damage to the apartment and requiring two residents to be treated by emergency services.

title: Lewickie-Stacja solar carport fire
cause: A structure consisting of 100 photovoltaic panels caught fire.
sourceTitle: Pożar paneli fotowoltaicznych w miejscowości Lewickie-Stacja. Spłonęły trei samochody
summary: A fire destroyed a solar structure consisting of 100 photovoltaic panels in Lewickie-Stacja. Three passenger cars parked underneath the panels were also completely burned.

title: Shanklea Primary School roof fire
cause: Solar panels on the roof were ablaze, prompting the council to isolate solar panels across similar properties while the matter is investigated.
summary: A fire broke out at Shanklea Primary School, leading to the disconnection of solar panels at over 80 other schools. The council had been aware of potential safety issues with the panels for over a year.

title: Saint-Aubin-de-Blaye solar farm brush fire
cause: Brush fire started under the solar panels.
sourceTitle: Un incendie menace un parc photovoltaïque dans cette commune au nord de la Gironde
summary: A brush fire broke out under the solar panels of a photovoltaic park in Saint-Aubin-de-Blaye, Gironde. The fire burned 7,000 sqm of grass without impacting electricity production.

title: Fleurance middle school roof fire
cause: A fire broke out on the roof involving photovoltaic panels, following a similar incident the day before; the exact cause is under investigation, but the department ordered the immediate removal of the panels.
summary: A fire destroyed 500 square meters of roofing at the Hubert Reeves middle school in Fleurance, involving the building's solar panels.

title: Casarsa della Delizia residential PV fire
cause: The fire involved the photovoltaic panels on the roof of a condominium, but the exact causes are still under investigation.
sourceTitle: Vigili del Fuoco Friuli Venezia Giulia
summary: A fire broke out involving the photovoltaic panels on the roof of a condominium, which was quickly extinguished by the fire brigade with no injuries reported.

title: Centro Comercial Colombo rooftop PV fire
cause: A short circuit in an electrical panel connected to a photovoltaic panel on the roof caused the fire, according to firefighters and the shopping center management.
summary: A short circuit in a rooftop solar panel installation caused a small fire at the Colombo shopping center in Lisbon. The fire was quickly extinguished by firefighters with only material damage.

title: Arad Bedouin community solar panel explosion
cause: An unspecified exploding object, thought to be a solar panel, injured a 21-year-old.
sourceTitle: 21-year-old in southern Israel hurt in explosion apparently caused by solar panel
summary: On July 13, 2025, a 21-year-old from a Bedouin community near Arad, Israel, was injured by an exploding object. According to Ynet, the object is thought to be a solar panel. The victim was taken to Soroka hospital in Beersheba.

title: Escorneboeuf residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire started in the photovoltaic panels on a house.
sourceTitle: Après trois incendies sur le toit d'un collège dans le Gers, faut-il craindre les panneaux photovoltaïques ?
summary: A fire occurred on the photovoltaic panels of a house in Escorneboeuf, Gers. The fire caused no casualties.

title: Montebelluna residential PV fire
cause: The photovoltaic system on the roof of a private home caught fire, with the cause not explicitly stated.
summary: Firefighters intervened to extinguish a fire involving a rooftop photovoltaic system on a private residence, preventing the flames from spreading.

title: Villalba de Guardo solar farm fire
cause: Fire affected the solar panels at the facility, requiring intervention by firefighters and environmental agents to prevent spread to the surrounding field. The exact cause was not officially determined.
summary: A fire broke out at the Villalba de Guardo photovoltaic plant, affecting the solar panels. Firefighters extinguished the blaze before it could spread to the surrounding countryside.

title: Dunajská Streda car dealership roof PV fire
cause: Fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof.
sourceTitle: Opäť sa vznietili solárne panely: Obrovský požiar autopredajne v Dunajskej Strede!
summary: A fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of a car dealership and service center in Dunajská Streda. The building was evacuated and nearby cars were moved to safety while firefighters dismantled the roof structure to stop the fire.

title: Changzhou Honeycomb Energy factory rooftop PV fire
cause: The cause of the fire is not explicitly stated, but it involved rooftop PV modules.
sourceTitle: “焦灼”蔓延，光伏组件这一“暗礁”问题正在浮现
summary: A fire broke out involving rooftop PV modules at a factory in Changzhou, Jiangsu. Fortunately, there were no casualties, and the factory building itself was not affected.

title: Goddelsheim commercial PV fire
cause: The cause of the fire was probably a technical defect in the inverter on the facade.
summary: A fire in a PV system at the Stede company in Goddelsheim required a large-scale operation by the fire department and rescue service. The inverter on the facade was extinguished and the hall was ventilated.

title: Gallarate residential PV fire
cause: The solar panels on the roof of a recently renovated villa caught fire; the cause of the ignition is under investigation.
summary: A fire broke out involving the solar panels on the roof of a villa, requiring a lengthy intervention by firefighters to secure the area.

title: Reston residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fairfax County Fire and Rescue determined that an electrical event involving the rooftop solar panels caused the fire.
summary: The fire was isolated to exterior roof panels; no one was injured, the family reoccupied the home, and damage was estimated at $60,527.

title: Beryl solar-farm fire
cause: Cause was not stated in the indexed incident report.
summary: Crews contained an approximately 10-acre fire threatening structures at the solar farm.

title: Sliven textile factory roof PV fire
cause: Fire started from the photovoltaics on the roof.
sourceTitle: Фотоволтаици подпалиха фабриката на Едоардо Миролио
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of the Edoardo Miroglio textile factory in Sliven, starting from the photovoltaic panels. Over 150 workers were evacuated, and firefighters successfully extinguished the blaze with no injuries reported.

title: North Sea floating solar park fire
cause: A short circuit in the connectors linking the solar panels caused a fire due to overheating from strong solar radiation.
sourceTitle: Brand op zonnepark op Noordzee, 'kinderziekte van nieuwe technologie'
summary: A fire broke out at a floating solar park off the coast of North Holland, the second such incident in two weeks. The fire was caused by a short circuit in the connectors linking the solar panels, resulting from overheating due to strong solar radiation. The park was disconnected pending repairs.

title: Viddalba solar farm arson
cause: Two men allegedly set fire to a solar park under construction, destroying 5,000 panels and a forklift.
summary: An arson attack at a solar farm under construction destroyed 5,000 photovoltaic panels and equipment.

title: Norwalk auto-dealership PV fire
cause: The fire marshal was investigating the cause at publication.
summary: Multiple rooftop panels burned; crews extinguished the incident in roughly ten minutes.

title: Ylivieska office building PV roof fire
cause: A solar panel on the roof caught fire, likely due to a defect in the panel.
sourceTitle: Aurinkopaneeli syttyi rakennuksen katolla Ylivieskassa – suuri vaara lähellä
summary: A solar panel on the roof of a 500-square-meter office building in Ylivieska caught fire. People in a neighboring property noticed the fire and managed to extinguish it before it spread to the roof structure. The fire caused damage to adjacent solar panels and a hole in the felt roof.

title: Saint-Mars-de-Coutais residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire suspected to be linked to the photovoltaic panels on the roof.
sourceTitle: Incendie dans une maison en Loire-Atlantique : la cause liée aux panneaux photovoltaïques sur le toit ?
summary: A fire destroyed a house in Saint-Mars-de-Coutais, Loire-Atlantique. Investigators are exploring a potential link to the solar panels installed on the roof.

title: Turnhout storage facility rooftop-PV fire
cause: The fire was likely caused by a short circuit in the high-voltage cabin below or on the roof.
sourceTitle: 600 vierkante meter aan zonnepanelen gaat in vlammen op in Turnhout: "Heel veel geluk, want loods ligt vol karton"
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of a storage facility in Turnhout, destroying 600 square meters of solar panels. The fire department arrived quickly and contained the blaze to the roof, preventing it from spreading to the cardboard packaging stored inside. The suspected cause is a short circuit.

title: Anthili solar farm fire
cause: A fire broke out in a photovoltaic park in the Anthili area.
sourceTitle: Πυρκαγιά σε φωτοβολταϊκό πάρκο στην Ανθήλη
summary: A fire broke out at a solar farm in Anthili, Greece. Four fire engines and 10 firefighters responded and quickly brought the fire under control before it could spread extensively.

title: Carmi solar farm field fire
cause: A field fire occurred at the solar farm, limited to vegetation with no damage to the solar panels.
summary: Firefighters battled a vegetation fire at an Ameren Missouri solar farm north of Carmi; no panels were damaged.

title: Lunwei East District floating solar park cable fire
cause: The fire was reportedly caused by a short circuit in a cable, resulting in the combustion of around 30 meters of cable line.
summary: A cable fire broke out at the 192 MW Lunwei East District floating solar park, damaging 30 meters of cable but causing no injuries.

title: Magdalensberg residential PV inverter fire
cause: A fire broke out in the inverter of a photovoltaic system located in a carport/storage room.
summary: A smoldering fire started in the inverter of a residential PV system in a carport in Magdalensberg. Firefighters had to remove the roof to extinguish the fire and prevent it from spreading to the main house.

title: Wellington North Solar Farm grass fire
cause: A grass fire broke out at the site during heatwave conditions; the cause is still being assessed.
summary: A 92-hectare grass fire occurred at the 400 MW Wellington North Solar Farm, causing limited damage to the northeast corner of the site.

title: Meißenheim half-timbered house PV fire
cause: After ruling out arson, investigators suspect a technical defect in the PV system's inverter caused the fire.
summary: A major fire destroyed a half-timbered house, with investigations pointing to a technical defect in the PV system's inverter as the likely cause, resulting in approximately 800,000 euros in damage.

title: Zielona Góra garage rooftop PV fire
cause: Exact cause unknown, owner extinguished the fire.
sourceTitle: Pożar w Zielonej Górze. Paliła się fotowoltaika na dachu budynku
summary: A fire broke out in the photovoltaic panels on the roof of a garage in Zatonie, Zielona Góra. The owner managed to extinguish the flames using a fire extinguisher before firefighters arrived, suffering minor burns in the process.

title: Northampton County solar farm wildfire
cause: Officials suspect the fire originated from unauthorized activity, potentially wire theft, after a hole was found cut into the facility's fence.
summary: A wildfire broke out at a solar installation and spread into surrounding woods, burning approximately 45 acres.

title: Secugnago farm PV fire
cause: Fire involved solar panels on the roof of a rural building.
sourceTitle: S’incendiano i pannelli solari di una cascina a Secugnago
summary: A fire broke out involving a photovoltaic system installed on the roof of a farmhouse in Secugnago. Firefighters from Sant'Angelo Lodigiano extinguished the flames, limiting damage to the solar panels without affecting the interior.

title: Saint-Laurent-en-Grandvaux school rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire allegedly caused by a malfunction in the photovoltaic installation.
sourceTitle: Jura. Incendie au collège de Saint-Laurent-en-Grandvaux : les panneaux solaires en cause
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of Louis Bouvier middle school in Saint-Laurent-en-Grandvaux, Jura, damaging 80 sqm of roofing. The fire was reportedly caused by a malfunction in the solar panels.

title: St. Margrethen commercial rooftop PV fire
cause: A fire broke out in the area of a photovoltaic system on a company roof.
summary: A fire occurred in a photovoltaic system on the roof of a company building in St. Margrethen. The building was temporarily evacuated, but the fire department quickly localized and controlled the fire before it could spread to other parts of the roof.

title: Kankakee County solar farm fire
cause: A fire involved an active panel within the facility following severe storms and tornadoes in the region.
summary: Multiple fire agencies responded to a fire involving an active panel at a rural solar farm southwest of Kankakee amidst tornado recovery efforts.

title: IES Manacor high school rooftop PV fire
cause: The fire was located in an electrical panel linked to the rooftop solar panel installation. The origin was described as strictly technical.
summary: A fire in an electrical panel connected to the rooftop solar installation forced the evacuation of the IES Manacor high school. Firefighters disconnected the PV system and extinguished the fire without structural damage or injuries.

title: Pingtung Linbian solar panel storage fire
cause: The fire occurred at a temporary storage yard for solar panels; the exact cause is under investigation, with authorities noting it could be due to improper storage leading to spontaneous combustion.
summary: A fire at a solar panel temporary storage yard in Linbian burned for about 4 hours, covering an area of 8,000 square meters. No casualties were reported, but the smoke affected nearby villages.

title: Saint-Pierre-des-Fleurs residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire originated from the photovoltaic panels on the roof.
sourceTitle: En Normandie, un incendie détruit le toit d’une maison et fait exploser des batteries : des panneaux solaires en cause
summary: A fire destroyed the roof of a house in Saint-Pierre-des-Fleurs, Eure, originating from solar panels. The fire also caused the batteries of the panels to explode.

title: Changhua Offshore Solar Panel Fire
cause: Cause not determined in available reporting.
sourceTitle: 彰濱海上太陽能板起火 半年內第二起 員工以滅火器控制火勢
summary: Fire broke out at an offshore solar panel installation in the Lunwei District of Changhua Coastal Industrial Park. Employees initially controlled the fire with extinguishers, and firefighters extinguished it with foam.

title: Emstek Ecopark meat processing plant PV fire
cause: The solar modules on the roof caught fire due to a technical defect.
sourceTitle: PV-Anlage von fleischverarbeitendem Betrieb im Emsteker Ecopark in Brand geraten
summary: A fire broke out in the rooftop PV system of a meat processing plant in the Ecopark Drantum industrial area. The fire was caused by a technical defect in the solar modules. The fire department quickly brought the fire under control, and the roof itself was not damaged.

title: Dobrin town hall roof PV fire
cause: Fire likely started from recently installed photovoltaic panels.
sourceTitle: Clădire recent renovată, mistuită de flăcări. Ce s-a întâmplat în sediul Primăriei
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of the recently renovated town hall in Dobrin, affecting about 100 square meters. Specialists suspect the fire started from the newly installed photovoltaic panels.

title: Olney residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Montgomery County Fire and Rescue reported fire confined to the rooftop solar panels; a final ignition cause was not stated.
summary: Crews prevented extension into the house and used PVStop to isolate the array; there were no injuries and the family reoccupied the home.

title: Champaign residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: The fire department determined the fire was happening on a solar energy system panel and deemed it accidental in nature.
summary: Firefighters quickly extinguished an accidental fire on a residential solar panel system, preventing smoke or damage inside the home.

title: West Jefferson fulfillment-center PV fire
cause: Cause was not established in initial reporting.
summary: Approximately 75–100 rooftop panels burned and the facility was evacuated.

title: Säve flygplats building PV roof fire
cause: A heavy fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of a building at Säve airport.
sourceTitle: Brand i solceller vid Säve flygplats – byggnad utrymdes
summary: A heavy fire broke out in the solar panels on the roof of a building at Säve airport in Gothenburg. The building was evacuated and there was heavy smoke development. The fire was extinguished by the fire department after about an hour.

title: Middleton Operations Center rooftop-PV fire
cause: The fire chief suspected an electrical issue involving the solar system; the final cause remained under investigation.
summary: Seven panels, electrical equipment and roof structure were damaged; crews extinguished the fire in about ten minutes and no one was injured.

title: Toms River residential solar-system fire
cause: The Bureau of Fire Prevention determined that an accidental electrical failure in the rooftop solar-panel area started the fire.
sourceTitle: Jersey Shore Online citing fire investigators
summary: The two-story home was declared unsafe and uninhabitable; no injury was reported.

title: Emmerthal commercial hall roof PV fire
cause: A fire broke out in the area of a solar system installed on the roof of a commercial hall; initial findings point to a technical defect.
summary: A fire occurred on the roof of a commercial hall in Emmerthal, likely caused by a technical defect in the solar system, resulting in approximately 10,000 euros in damage.

title: Breidenbach solar company inverter fire
cause: The fire broke out at inverters inside the hall, which convert the direct current from a solar system into alternating current.
sourceTitle: Brand in Solaranlagen-Firma in Breidenbach: Wechselrichter wohl Ursache
summary: A fire broke out in the hall of a company for photovoltaic systems in Breidenbach. The fire did not start from the solar system on the roof, but from the inverters inside the hall. The damage is estimated at around 400,000 euros.

title: Hainesville residential PV-system roof fire
cause: The fire marshal reported that energized electrical activity, arcing and failure in the rooftop PV system caused the fire.
sourceTitle: Lake & McHenry County Scanner citing fire marshal
summary: Fire spread from the solar installation into the roof and left the home uninhabitable; no injuries were reported.

title: Guéhenno residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire reportedly started from the solar panels on the roof.
sourceTitle: Violent incendie dans le centre Morbihan : la faute aux panneaux solaires ?
summary: A major fire severely damaged a house in Guéhenno, Morbihan. The owners stated the fire started from the solar panels on the roof, which complicated firefighting efforts.

title: Villerville residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire started in the photovoltaic panels and spread to the roof.
sourceTitle: Calvados : des panneaux photovoltaïques prennent feu et embrasent la toiture d’une maison la famille évacuée de justesse
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of a house in Villerville, Calvados, starting from the photovoltaic panels. The family evacuated safely, but the roof was largely destroyed.

title: Den Bosch residential solar-roof fire
cause: The fire originated near the solar panels integrated into the roof; the exact cause is under investigation.
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of two homes involving integrated solar panels, leading to the precautionary evacuation of seven homes.

title: Stratford residential solar-panel fire
cause: The local fire marshal was investigating the ignition source.
summary: Multiple rooftop panels burned with extension into roofing material; occupants evacuated safely.

title: Vialonga DHL warehouse rooftop PV fire
cause: The fire started on the roof of the warehouse, with firefighters suspecting problems with the photovoltaic panels, similar to a previous fire at the same location weeks earlier. Official investigation is pending.
summary: A major fire completely destroyed a DHL logistics warehouse in Vialonga, starting on the roof where solar panels were installed. This was the second fire at the facility in less than a month, raising suspicions about the PV system.

title: Solúcar solar plant fire
cause: Fire spread through dry vegetation and affected the solar plant facilities.
sourceTitle: Un incendio en la planta fotovoltaica de Solúcar obliga a un amplio despliegue de medios en Sanlúcar la Mayor
summary: A major fire broke out at the Solúcar photovoltaic plant in Sanlúcar la Mayor, Sevilla. The fire was complicated by dry vegetation, high temperatures, and difficult access for heavy vehicles, requiring a large deployment of firefighters and aerial means.

title: Sint-Katelijne-Waver commercial solar-roof fire
cause: Initial reports indicate the fire was caused by a short circuit in the solar panels on the roof of the commercial hall.
summary: A severe fire broke out on the roof of a commercial building, producing a thick black smoke plume, suspected to be caused by a short circuit in the solar panels.

title: Seguin bottling-plant rooftop-PV fire
cause: Solar panels on the approximately one-million-square-foot plant roof burned; the ignition cause remained under investigation.
summary: The plant was evacuated; panels and roof were heavily damaged, light smoke reached the interior, and no injuries were reported.

title: Salteras solar farm inverter fire
cause: The fire affected one of the inverters in a field of photovoltaic panels. The exact cause of the inverter failure was not detailed.
summary: Firefighters from Santiponce responded to a fire involving an inverter at a solar farm in Salteras. The incident resulted only in material damage with no injuries reported.

title: Lultzhausen sports hall rooftop-PV fire
cause: A major fire destroyed a sports hall, with firefighting efforts hindered by the photovoltaic installation on the roof.
sourceTitle: Brand in Sporthalle Lultzhausen: Vereine ohne Heimat
summary: A major fire destroyed a sports and multi-purpose hall in Lultzhausen. Firefighting efforts were significantly hindered by the photovoltaic installation on the roof, which shielded the fire from the outside. The cause of the fire is undetermined.

title: Pamelia solar farm fire
cause: A small fire broke out at a solar site in the Town of Pamelia.
sourceTitle: Solar farm fire in the Town of Pamelia Sunday
summary: On June 7, 2026, a small fire broke out at a solar site in the Town of Pamelia, New York. The incident was reported by local news, and the cause is currently under investigation.

title: Uberlândia residential solar roof fire
cause: The homeowner alleged that the fire started in the solar panel system, but the official cause has not been determined.
summary: A fire destroyed part of a house in the Shopping Park neighborhood; the owner suspected the solar panels were the origin.

title: Meinier residential solar panel fire
cause: Solar panels on the roof of a building caught fire; the exact cause was not immediately reported.
summary: A significant roof fire involving solar panels occurred on a building in the center of Meinier, requiring a large firefighter response.

title: Pattani solar farm arson attack
cause: Assailants broke into a solar power plant construction site and set fire to a solar panel storage area.
summary: An arson attack at a solar power plant construction site in Pattani damaged a solar panel storage area, with no injuries reported.

title: Asheville Chamber of Commerce rooftop-PV fire
cause: A fire was contained to a single solar panel on the roof of the building; the cause was not specified.
summary: A small fire broke out on a single solar panel atop the Asheville Chamber of Commerce building and was quickly extinguished with no reported damages.

title: Boyle Heights cold-storage warehouse fire
cause: The facility operator said the fire began while contractors were testing rooftop solar panels; the official investigation remained open.
summary: A multi-day warehouse fire prompted shelter-in-place actions and was complicated by an ammonia release.

title: Bassum commercial hall PV fire
cause: A fire broke out in an area of about 25 square meters of a photovoltaic system on the roof of a commercial hall.
summary: The fire departments of Bassum and surrounding communities were alerted to a fire on the roof of a commercial hall, where about 25 square meters of a photovoltaic system were burning. Two employees of the company had already fought the fire with hand fire extinguishers immediately after discovery, so the fire department only had to check the fire site.

title: Bernay-Neuvy-en-Champagne storage building PV fire
cause: Flames reportedly started due to the photovoltaic panels.
sourceTitle: Des panneaux photovoltaïques déclenchent un incendie dans un bâtiment de stockage d'affaires en Sarthe
summary: A fire broke out in a storage building in Bernay-Neuvy-en-Champagne, Sarthe, suspected to be caused by solar panels. A nearby high-voltage line melted during the incident.

title: Elazığ Tadım village solar power plant fire
cause: The cause of the fire is yet to be determined and an investigation has been initiated.
sourceTitle: Elazığ'da GES alanında çıkan yangın söndürüldü
summary: On the evening of June 22, 2026, a fire broke out at a solar power plant in Tadım village, Elazığ, Turkey. Firefighters responded to the scene and successfully extinguished the blaze. While there were no casualties or injuries, the facility sustained damage, and an investigation into the cause is ongoing.

title: Sidegate Primary School roof fire
cause: Firefighters confirmed beyond reasonable doubt that the cause was a solar panel on the roof, though the exact electrical fault remains under investigation.
summary: A fire broke out on the roof of Sidegate Primary School, leading to the evacuation of 650 pupils and 100 staff. The incident prompted the council to temporarily switch off solar panels at 80 schools.

title: Jablonné nad Orlicí carpentry roof PV fire
cause: Technical fault in the electrical installation of the photovoltaic system.
sourceTitle: Požár fotovoltaiky v Jablonném nad Orlicí
summary: A fire damaged the roof structure of a carpentry company in Jablonné nad Orlicí. Official investigation confirmed the cause was a technical fault in the photovoltaic system's electrical installation.

title: Ermont residential rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire started from 200 sqm of photovoltaic panels and spread to the roof.
sourceTitle: Les panneaux photovoltaïques prennent feu, la toiture d'une maison détruite dans le Val-d'Oise
summary: A violent fire destroyed the roof of a house in Ermont, Val-d'Oise, starting from 200 sqm of solar panels. Five residents were relocated, and two firefighters suffered from heat exhaustion.

title: Allendale Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center rooftop-PV fire
cause: A rooftop solar panel caught fire at a rehabilitation and healthcare center.
sourceTitle: Solar Panel Fire Forces Resident Relocations At Allendale Rehab Center
summary: On June 29, 2026, a rooftop solar panel caught fire at the Allendale Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center in Allendale, New Jersey. The fire forced the temporary relocation of residents whose rooms were directly below the affected area. The fire was extinguished, and no injuries were reported.

title: Asnières-sur-Seine school rooftop-PV fire
cause: Fire suspected to originate from the photovoltaic panels on the roof.
sourceTitle: Incendie : le toit d'une école recouvert de panneaux photovoltaïques prend feu à Asnières-sur-Seine
summary: The roof of Flachat elementary school in Asnières-sur-Seine caught fire, destroying almost the entire roof. The municipality suspects the solar panels were the origin.

title: La Mudarra solar farm fire
cause: A fire broke out in a solar farm with 228,000 panels. Firefighters reportedly mentioned possible ground faults or reflections as potential hazards, but no official cause was confirmed.
summary: A fire occurred at a large solar farm in La Mudarra, prompting intervention by firefighters. The incident sparked debate among local farmers regarding fire prevention regulations for solar installations.

title: Amarillo apartment complex rooftop-PV fire
cause: The Amarillo Fire Marshal ruled the fire accidental, but the official cause could not be determined; the fire involved the rooftop solar panel system.
summary: A fire involving rooftop solar panels displaced 10 residents and caused moderate damage to the building, though it did not spread into occupied living spaces.

title: Lubań enterprise building roof PV fire
cause: The fire switch caught fire, preventing the disconnection of the panels.
sourceTitle: Pożar fotowoltaiki na Dolnym Śląsku. Strażacy nie mogli odłączyć instalacji
summary: A photovoltaic installation caught fire on the roof of an enterprise building in Lubań. Firefighters could not disconnect the system because the fire switch itself had caught fire, but employees managed to extinguish the flames with fire extinguishers.

title: Uruapan gas station solar panel fire
cause: A short circuit in the solar panel system is suspected to have caused the fire.
sourceTitle: Se registra conato de incendio en sistema de paneles solares de gasolinera, en Uruapan
summary: An incipient fire broke out in the solar panel system of a gas station in Uruapan, Michoacan, Mexico. The incident, apparently caused by a short circuit, mobilized firefighters and rescue personnel who quickly controlled the situation without major consequences.

title: Manchester Walmart rooftop-PV fire
cause: Manchester fire officials reported several banks of rooftop solar panels actively burning; a final ignition cause was not reported.
sourceTitle: CT Insider citing Manchester Fire Department
summary: Firefighters extinguished burning rooftop PV equipment, secured the solar system and checked the roof and store for extension. The roof sustained minor damage, the store closed for about an hour and no injuries were reported.
